Introduction
In this section learn how funnels work with Facebook ads and why I
recommend 4 key layers in your funnel strategy together with the
objectives, audiences and creatives *generally* recommended to form the
basis of your testing.
The 4 Funnel System
VIDEO 1 HERE
4 Funnel System Setup
A walkthrough of how I like to setup my account and why, plus a look at how I might
use this to plan budgets at the early stage and as the account grows.
VIDEO 2 HERE
Ecommerce Example
A detailed look into a typical Ecommerce campaign funnel within Facebook and how
that looks in practice in an account.
Once you understand why this funnel works it'll make it clearer as to how to set up
your own funnel. The following video focusses on Ecommerce, but the concept
works for most types of campaigns, whether a digital product or mobile apps. Your
account/campaign will be specific to you, and you may not need all the layers, but
the logical structure here will enable you to better plan your budgets, creatives and
optimisation efforts.
VIDEO 3 HERE
Lead Gen Example
A run through of two digital product / lead gen campaigns, including setup and
results.
